offer: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate accounts receivable instead of manual tracking of payments and invoices.
problem: Difficulty in tracking customer payments and managing overdue invoices
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on payment tracking
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums for Etsy seller tools
try_it: Let users try payment tracking dashboard for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for ease
CSV import feature for existing invoices
Streamline onboarding process for new users
